title: Estheriel's Weird As Blocks
description:
A mod that adds a few new decorative building blocks. Open to suggestions!

This is my first mod, made with Mcreator.
body:
Once again, a mod that adds new decorative building blocks (3 for every wood type, and a few extras)
Unlock all the recipes by holding a stonecutter.

The new blocks based on the wood types consist of 2 panels, which can be directionally placed, and each have 2 varients with metal bands.

These new blocks can significantly help decorating and perfecting your builds in ways that vanilla blocks cannot already do.

![Mod logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50f68244069450033cac26bf3dd7c292590716cf.png)
